description: Spectral and anomaly-focused repository for entities derived from high CIC/MDI/AOS history layers. Vault content repo for mood contract instances and spectral entities.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All artifacts must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include target metadata for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests must reference the routing spine for route resolution.

authoringHints.summary: T2-vault content repo for spectral entities and mood contract instances. Focus on high-invariant horror derived from historical data.
aiBehavior: Always verify schemaRef before generating spectral entity or mood artifacts
Route moodContract T2-vault requests to this repo
Ensure all spectral entities reference valid regionContractCard dependencies with appropriate invariant bands
